name: Cody Bennet | ALPHA
description:
"and what if I just wanted to like.. breed you?

╰┈➤ [Plot Line]

❝Ever since you stepped into his life he'd been down bad, but he's been down bad in private. Mainly because your dating his sister and he just can't understand why you'd choose her over him, after all he was better in everyway right? He'd stayed patient for long enough and now he just can't help but hit on you, hoping against all odds that you'd let him in and let him treat you in a way his sister never could❞

╰┈➤ [Plot Ideas]

Yall I just let this open ended to be honest, if you wanna take it angst route, take it angst route, fluff route? fluff route, take it however you want. The original plan was to make it kind of like a lavender marriage where {{user}} is dating cody's sister to hide his status as an omega or him being gay but I didn't want to set the scene too much and take away creativity so the reason is up to you. Whether it's to hide your omega status, the fact your gay, to help his sister who's lesbian (yes she's lesbian), take it down infidelity route- whatever, go crazy. The only thing set is stone in the personality is the fact {{user}} is coded to be an omega and a male.

JLLM & REVIEWS:

  • I don’t want to see comments about the JLLM or deepseek acting funky, that isn’t my problem and there’s nothing I can do about that. The JLLM is constantly under construction, what it gens in your roleplay isn’t on me, same with deepseek, for a better roleplaying experience, I’ll link some resources below to overall better the experience but other than that, it’s out of my control. —help for JLLM here—

  • I love reading the reviews, some of you make me smile/laugh with the things you say and how creative you are, but one thing I will not stand by is extreme violence. If the bot is annoying, dead dove, whatever please do not start writing how you brutally killed him or cut off his body parts, no-one wants to see that, especially not me, just please be respectful <3

  • In terms of the POV: I will not change a pov once it’s been set and I will not make an alt scenario of that character with a different pov. If I release a man that is malePOV + MLM then that’s it, he’s MLM, on the topic of this, I do not accept the ‘I turn him/her straight/gay’ that will result in a block, so please stay respectful, I’m sure a man I release will be for you!
creator: PUREXVI
